module-checks.check-1: README covers project value, one-script deploy flow, TLS modes, and certificate reuse guidance.

scenarios.scenario-1: A new operator can understand what the project does and how to deploy it from the root README.
scenarios.scenario-2: README must not diverge from actual install entrypoint names or TLS flows.

required-log-markers.marker-1: README references install.sh and TLS_MODE paths consistently.
